concept: Can you whip up a racing game where vehicles constantly grow additional components based on their current race position, fundamentally changing handling characteristics? Last-place racers develop massive speed-boosting engines while leaders sprout heavy defensive armor, creating a dynamic balancing system that prevents sustained leads. Tracks feature transformation zones that interact differently with various vehicle components, requiring strategic planning about when to lead versus fall behind. Players can temporarily shed unwanted components at designated drop zones, but doing so creates obstacles for trailing racers. The championship finale features a track that loops through all previous courses, requiring mastery of all possible vehicle transformation states.
